title: Significant Amount of Coal Remains Stockpiled in India
section_path: Significant Amount of Coal Remains Stockpiled in India
section_path_text: Significant Amount of Coal Remains Stockpiled in India
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore's most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, Coal India produced 59.9 million tons of coal last month. This has marked a month-on-month increase of 2.3 million tons (4%) and a year-on-year increase of 5.2 million tons (10%). Coal India's production has now increased on a year-on-year basis during twenty-four of the last twenty-five months, and last month's 10% growth has marked the second largest growth seen all year.
